markets.rules_primary: If the number of Truth Social posts by Donald Trump from Mar 22, 2026 to Mar 28, 2026 is below 80, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The observation period begins at 12:00 AM ET on Mar 22, 2026 and ends at 11:59 PM ET on Mar 28, 2026. The primary resolution source for this market is Roll Call. In the event that Roll Call data is unavailable or inaccurate, alternative sources may be used at Kalshi's discretion. Truths, ReTruths, and Quote Truths are included in the total count. Replies are included only if captured by Roll Call. The post count will be recorded at 10:00 AM ET on Mar 29, 2026. Posts deleted as of the Expiration Time will not be included. "Between" is inclusive of the lower and upper bound.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump make below 80 Truth Social posts the week of Mar 22, 2026?
